title: Immersive Aircraft x Bare Bones
description: Bare Bones addon for Immersive Aircraft mod
body:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gHC4Ydqg/images/5e782f8942ea2817f7f1f053dc7ff48b514f9a41.png)
Simplistic resourse pack addon in style of [Bare Bones (by RobotPants)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) for [Immersive Aircraft mod (by Luke100000)](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft)
